OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The token of the user who represents the connector in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope defines the set of entity types that the enrichment connector is allowed to process.

CONNECTOR_TYPE.description: Should always be set to INTERNAL_ENRICHMENT for this connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enables or disables automatic enrichment of observables for OpenCTI.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_IMPORT_AS_PDF.description: Import external references as PDF files.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_IMPORT_AS_MD.description: Import external references as MarkDown files.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_IMPORT_PDF_AS_.description: If import_as_md is true, try to convert PDF as Markdown.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_TIMESTAMP_FILE.description: If true, timestamp imported files to prevent overwriting versions.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_CACHE_SIZE.description: Size of LRU URL cache to prevent fetching the same object repeatedly.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_BROWSER_WORKER.description: Number of browser worker threads to use.
